workflows.name: Sign in with credentials
workflows.on_success: flashes 'Signed in successfully.' and redirects to Accounts Overview page

workflows.name: Navigate to Forgot Password
workflows.on_success: navigates to Forgot Password page

workflows.name: Register new account (all required fields valid)
workflows.on_success: Account created successfully — please sign in

workflows.name: Click Account Number link (clickable but not implemented)
workflows.on_success: Link is clickable but not implemented; no navigation or further action occurs

workflows.name: Open Checking Account (meets $25 minimum and funding sufficient)
workflows.on_success: Account opened successfully!

workflows.name: Open Savings Account (meets $100 minimum and funding sufficient)
workflows.on_success: Account opened successfully!

workflows.name: Internal transfer between My ParaBank accounts
workflows.on_success: Transfer completed successfully. returns transaction ID

workflows.name: External transfer to an External Account (with account confirmation)
workflows.on_success: Transfer completed successfully. returns transaction ID

workflows.name: Submit bill payment
workflows.on_success: Payment submitted successfully. Returns a reference code and updates account balances.

workflows.name: Submit valid Personal loan application (meets ranges, down payment and collateral)
workflows.conditional_branch: Loan_Type == Personal AND Loan_Amount >= 1000 AND Loan_Amount <= 50000 AND Down_Payment < Loan_Amount AND Down_Payment >= 0.10 * Loan_Amount AND Collateral_Account.balance >= 0.20 * Loan_Amount
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! returns loan account details; no actual balance debits occur

workflows.name: Submit valid Auto loan application (meets ranges, down payment and collateral)
workflows.conditional_branch: Loan_Type == Auto AND Loan_Amount >= 5000 AND Loan_Amount <= 75000 AND Down_Payment < Loan_Amount AND Down_Payment >= 0.10 * Loan_Amount AND Collateral_Account.balance >= 0.20 * Loan_Amount
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! returns loan account details; no actual balance debits occur

workflows.name: Submit valid Home loan application (meets ranges, down payment and collateral)
workflows.conditional_branch: Loan_Type == Home AND Loan_Amount >= 50000 AND Loan_Amount <= 500000 AND Down_Payment < Loan_Amount AND Down_Payment >= 0.10 * Loan_Amount AND Collateral_Account.balance >= 0.20 * Loan_Amount
workflows.on_success: Loan approved and created successfully! returns loan account details; no actual balance debits occur

workflows.name: Submit Personal loan with Loan_Amount out of allowed range
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit Auto loan with Loan_Amount out of allowed range
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit Home loan with Loan_Amount out of allowed range
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit with Down_Payment greater than or equal to Loan_Amount (invalid)
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit with Down_Payment below minimum 10% of Loan_Amount (credit engine enforces minimum)
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit with Collateral_Account balance insufficient for required 20% collateral
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Submit with non-positive Loan_Amount (invalid)
workflows.on_success: Loan denied; system surfaces specific reasons such as 'Insufficient credit history' or 'Inadequate collateral value'

workflows.name: Update Contact Profile
workflows.on_success: Profile updated successfully.; refreshes the data

workflows.name: Request a new card
workflows.on_success: opens card-request ticket and shows "Card request submitted successfully." with tracking ID

workflows.name: Update existing card controls
workflows.on_success: Card controls updated successfully.

workflows.name: Execute Buy trade
workflows.on_success: executes same-day trade, updates holdings, displays "Trade executed successfully." with order ID

workflows.name: Execute Sell trade
workflows.on_success: executes same-day trade, updates holdings, displays "Trade executed successfully." with order ID

workflows.name: Create recurring investment plan
workflows.on_success: stores schedule and shows "Plan created successfully."

workflows.name: Generate Statement — Month-and-Year period
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully.

workflows.name: Generate Statement — Custom Date Range period
workflows.on_success: Statement generated successfully.

workflows.name: Save e-Statement Preference — Paperless opt-in (email required)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Save e-Statement Preference — Paperless opt-out (no email required)
workflows.on_success: e-Statement preference updated.

workflows.name: Change Password
workflows.on_success: updates credentials and returns "Password changed successfully."

workflows.name: Send Secure Message
workflows.on_success: Message sent successfully. Returns ticket ID.

workflows.name: Request Callback
workflows.on_success: Callback request submitted. Sends email confirmation.
